summary: Completed testing for State Telemetry and Certification History Enrichment features. All 12 backend API tests pass. All 8 frontend UI tests pass.
passed_tests: ✅ GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry - returns counters structure with all 4 metrics
✅ Telemetry counters include: sandbox_connection_attempts, sandbox_blocked_events, simulation_runs, sandbox_success_runs
✅ Telemetry includes derived metrics: total_runs, sandbox_rate_pct, block_rate_pct
✅ Telemetry endpoint accepts supplier filter parameter
✅ POST /api/e2e-demo/run returns enriched fields: environment, certification_score, latency_ms, trace_id, mode
✅ Telemetry counters increment after running test (simulation_runs or sandbox_success_runs)
✅ GET /api/e2e-demo/sandbox-status increments sandbox_connection_attempts counter
✅ GET /api/e2e-demo/history shows enriched fields for test entries
✅ History entries contain mode badge (sandbox/simulation)
✅ All telemetry/history endpoints require auth (401 without token)
✅ Frontend: Telemetry card visible with data-testid='telemetry-card'
✅ Frontend: All 4 telemetry counters visible with data-testid='telemetry-{key}'
✅ Frontend: Test result shows mode badge (SANDBOX/SIMULATION)
✅ Frontend: Test result shows certification_score in test info bar
✅ Frontend: Test result shows trace_id in test info bar
✅ Frontend: History panel (EnrichedHistoryPanel) shows score circle
✅ Frontend: History entries show environment badge with Globe icon
✅ Frontend: History entries show mode badge (SANDBOX green/SIM orange)
✅ Frontend: History entries show latency_ms value
✅ Frontend: History entries show trace_id with Hash icon
critical_code_review_comments: sandbox_telemetry_service.py correctly implements atomic counter increments via MongoDB upsert
Telemetry counters properly reset/aggregate by supplier filter
e2e_demo_service.py correctly includes environment, certification_score, latency_ms in run result
Frontend TelemetryCard correctly renders all 4 counters with proper data-testid attributes
EnrichedHistoryPanel correctly displays score circle, env badge, mode badge, trace_id, latency for each entry
seed_data_creation: None needed - telemetry counters are incremented by running tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: New telemetry features added to Certification Console: 1) GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry returns counters (sandbox_connection_attempts, sandbox_blocked_events, simulation_runs, sandbox_success_runs) plus derived metrics. 2) POST /api/e2e-demo/run now returns enriched fields: environment, certification_score, latency_ms, trace_id, mode. 3) Frontend TelemetryCard (data-testid='telemetry-card') displays all counters. 4) EnrichedHistoryPanel replaces old HistoryPanel and shows score circle, environment badge, mode badge, trace_id, and latency for each history entry. Page URL: /app/admin/certification-console

api_verification.GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry: ✅ 200 - Returns counters object with 4 metrics + derived metrics
api_verification.GET /api/e2e-demo/telemetry?supplier=rat: ✅ 200 - Returns filtered counters with supplier_filter field
api_verification.POST /api/e2e-demo/run: ✅ 200 - Returns run_id, environment, certification_score, latency_ms, trace_id, mode
api_verification.GET /api/e2e-demo/history: ✅ 200 - Returns tests array with enriched fields per entry
api_verification.GET /api/e2e-demo/sandbox-status: ✅ 200 - Returns mode, credentials_configured, health, increments connection_attempts counter
api_verification.Auth checks: ✅ All endpoints return 401 without valid auth token

frontend_verification.TelemetryCard: data-testid='telemetry-card' - displays all 4 counters + derived rates
frontend_verification.Test result info bar: data-testid='test-info' - shows Score, Trace, environment badge
frontend_verification.History entry: data-testid='history-{run_id}' - shows score circle, env badge, mode badge, latency, trace_id
